creator: walkingshadow@grummel.net
text:
This updates the tigcc port to the latest beta, namely v0.96.b7.
I unmarked it broken on 4-STABLE as I successfully built it in
a 4-STABLE Tinderbox.

Best regrards,
Jona

Fix: Those patches:
patch-gnu-gcc-4.0.2-gcc-mklibgcc.in
patch-tigcc-sources-a68k-A68kdef.h
are not needed anymore
